text:
Upon entering the first room, I feel a tangible sense of anticipation and curiosity—an enclosed space of focused energy, where others gather around shared pursuits and ideas. The presence of an active timer on the screen hints at time’s gentle pressure, nudging us toward completion and reflection. Here, community and collaboration intermingle.

Transitioning to the second scene, I am awash in colors and the language of innovation. The boldness of "R+D" and the playful design evoke a sense of creative possibility. I feel inspired and inquisitive, drawn to the intersection of research and artistic exploration. Each display is a portal to new understanding—a celebration of collective intellect and the drive to reshape our world.
